tasks.subject: Task 1: Slim the note record schema (Channel A)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove queue/index/position/MusicControlTrack from MusicControlRecord; tolerate legacy records carrying them.

**Files:** musicControlNote.ts; musicControlNote.test.ts (MERGE).

**Acceptance Criteria:** record drops queue/index/position; isRecord accepts slim (no position); parseRecordsFromXml tolerates legacy; serializeRecords emits no queue/index/position.

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicControlNote.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/musicControlNote.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicControlNote.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicControlNote.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["drop queue/index/position", "isRecord accepts slim", "tolerate legacy", "serialize emits no queue/position"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Headless JSONContent music-queue parser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** buildQueueFromXml rebuilds queue from raw XML by walking JSONContent, reusing parseMusicNote helpers.

**Files:** parseMusicNote.ts (export URL_RE/trimTrailingPunct); headlessMusicParse.ts (new); headlessMusicParse.test.ts (new).

**Acceptance Criteria:** matches parseMusicNote URLs for 3 patterns; inlineCheckbox header gate; non-music → []; mark href preferred, trailing punct trimmed.

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/headlessMusicParse.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/parseMusicNote.ts", "app/src/lib/music/headlessMusicParse.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/headlessMusicParse.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/headlessMusicParse.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["matches 3 patterns", "checkbox gate", "non-music []", "mark href + trim"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: deviceStateSync module + Firestore adapter (Channel B)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DI'd throttled client writing position to users/{uid}/deviceState/{deviceId} (<=1/10s, flush on demand), one-shot read; gated like note-sync.

**Files:** deviceStateSync.ts (new); deviceStateSync.firestore.ts (new); deviceStateSync.test.ts (new).

**Acceptance Criteria:** writePosition throttled 1/interval per track, immediate on track change; flushPosition bypasses; disabled/signed-out no-op; readDeviceState returns doc or null.

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/deviceStateSync.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/deviceStateSync.ts", "app/src/lib/music/deviceStateSync.firestore.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/deviceStateSync.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/deviceStateSync.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["throttle 1/interval", "flush bypass", "gate no-op", "read doc/null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Feed Channel B from the audio engine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Engine reports position to deviceStateSync — throttled on timeupdate, flushed on seek + every transport (pre-clear).

**Files:** deviceStatePlayback.ts (new seam); musicAudio.svelte.ts; musicControl.svelte.ts; deviceStatePlaybackWiring.test.ts (new).

**Acceptance Criteria:** timeupdate→report; seek→flush; transport→flush with pre-clear track.

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/deviceStatePlaybackWiring.test.ts && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/deviceStatePlayback.ts", "app/src/lib/music/musicAudio.svelte.ts", "app/src/lib/music/musicControl.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/deviceStatePlaybackWiring.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/deviceStatePlaybackWiring.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["timeupdate report", "seek flush", "transport pre-clear flush"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Slim write path + track-change transport
tasks.description:
**Goal:** recordTransport writes slim record; player gains 'track' kind on advance, emits 'pause' on exhaust so Channel A trackUrl stays current.

**Files:** musicPlayer.svelte.ts; musicControl.svelte.ts; musicPlayerTransport.test.ts (new); musicControlWrite.test.ts (MERGE).

**Acceptance Criteria:** TransportKind has 'track'→'playing'; next/prev/reportEnded emit track-on-advance, pause-on-exhaust; initial gesture play one 'play'; recordTransport slim, no queue/position.

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicPlayerTransport.test.ts tests/unit/music/musicControlWrite.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/musicPlayer.svelte.ts", "app/src/lib/music/musicControl.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicPlayerTransport.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicControlWrite.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicPlayerTransport.test.ts tests/unit/music/musicControlWrite.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["track kind", "advance/exhaust emits", "one play", "slim write"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Rewrite read/restore — re-parse, Channel-B position, auto-pause
tasks.description:
**Goal:** refreshFromNote rebuilds queue via buildQueueFromXml(noteGuid), reads position one-shot from Channel B, pauses this device when another device's newer record is playing (single-playback #1).

**Files:** musicControl.svelte.ts; musicControlRead.test.ts (MERGE; rewrite queue cases to seed real note).

**Acceptance Criteria:** tracksFromRecord async re-parse + index@trackUrl + synthetic fallback; seed Channel-B position when trackUrl matches; newer remote playing → pause (queue kept); paused/stopped/not-newer → no pause; dedupe holds.

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicControlRead.test.ts && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/musicControl.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicControlRead.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/musicControlRead.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["re-parse + index + fallback", "Channel-B position", "newer remote pause keep-queue", "no false pause", "dedupe"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Continuity decision logic + remote-resume API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure continuityChoice predicate + resumeGlobalLatest (explicit remote adopt+play in gesture); rename getGlobalLatestForTest→getGlobalLatest.

**Files:** continuity.ts (new); musicControl.svelte.ts; continuity.test.ts (new); musicControlRead.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** continuityChoice none/local/remote/both per both+different→both, one→that, same→local, neither→none; resumeGlobalLatest restores+plays, returns bool; getGlobalLatest exported.

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/continuity.test.ts tests/unit/music/musicControlRead.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/music/continuity.ts", "app/src/lib/music/musicControl.svelte.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/continuity.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/music/musicControlRead.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/continuity.test.ts tests/unit/music/musicControlRead.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["choice none/local/remote/both", "resumeGlobalLatest bool", "getGlobalLatest export"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Continuity picker UI (mobile sheet + rail menu)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** MusicContinuityPicker component + rail expand menu wired to continuityChoice + resumeGlobalLatest.

**Files:** MusicContinuityPicker.svelte (new); RailMusicControls.svelte; continuityPicker.test.ts (new).

**Acceptance Criteria:** picker renders 2 labelled options, emits onpick; rail opens menu on 'both', routes local/remote+gesture; non-both unchanged; menu --z-menu, preserve styles + parent relative.

**Verify:** `cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/continuityPicker.test.ts && npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/MusicContinuityPicker.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/RailMusicControls.svelte", "app/tests/unit/music/continuityPicker.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/music/continuityPicker.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["picker 2 options onpick", "rail menu on both", "non-both unchanged", "--z-menu preserve styles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Mobile home FAB + remove floating pill
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Home-note play/pause FAB (only ?from=home, when something to play) wired to continuity flow; delete GlobalMiniPlayer + helpers.

**Files:** note/[id]/+page.svelte; +layout.svelte; delete GlobalMiniPlayer.svelte/miniPlayerVisibility.ts/miniPlayerDrag.ts + orphan tests; index.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** .fab-music at bottom calc(88px+56px*2) on ?from=home when queue>0 or remote; ⏸/▶ toggle via continuity flow + gesture; joins focus-within fade; GlobalMiniPlayer fully removed; check passes.

**Verify:** `cd app && grep -rn 'GlobalMiniPlayer|miniPlayerVisibility|miniPlayerDrag' src tests; npm run check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/note/[id]/+page.svelte", "app/src/routes/+layout.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/GlobalMiniPlayer.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/miniPlayerVisibility.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/miniPlayerDrag.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fab-music gated + positioned", "toggle continuity+gesture", "focus fade", "pill removed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Guide card + full verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document new behavior in 설정→가이드; whole suite + type-check green.

**Files:** settings/+page.svelte (guide sub-tab notes); full suite.

**Acceptance Criteria:** guide-card covers single-play/home-FAB/picker/pill-removal; npm run check 0 errors; npm run test all pass.

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check && npm run test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["guide-card 4 points", "check 0", "test green"]}
```
